evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); MOS.abrirMembreteCard('IDPRO0001145'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); const boxes=[...document.querySelectorAll('.ms-prev-box')]; r.previews=boxes.length; r.dims=boxes.map(b=>{const rc=b.getBoundingClientRect();const inner=b.querySelector('.ms-prev-inner')?.getBoundingClientRect();return {boxW:Math.round(rc.width),innerW:inner?Math.round(inner.width):0,cabe:inner?inner.width<=rc.width+2:false};}); return r; })()
